title: Beam Global (BEEM) Q4 2024 Earnings Highlights
text: Beam Global delivered impressive growth in 2024, with revenue reaching $49.3 million, representing a 124% increase over 2022. The company achieved a substantial improvement in profitability metrics, with gross margin expanding from 2% in 2023 to 15% in 2024 (adjusted gross margin of 21%). Operating losses contracted meaningfully, declining from $16.3 million in 2023 to $11.7 million in 2024. On a non-GAAP basis, operating losses fell 24% year-over-year to $8.9 million. The company successfully diversified its customer base, with corporate sales representing 64% of total sales in Q4 2024. Management expanded sales infrastructure across the US and Europe while introducing multiple new products, including BeamBike, BeamPatrol, BeamSpot, and BeamWell. Geographic expansion efforts extended into Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, though the company acknowledged headwinds from the US government's negative stance on electric vehicles affecting federal sales. Cash reserves declined to $4.6 million at year-end from $10.4 million previously. However, operating cash burn improved substantially, with net cash used in operations dropping to $2.2 million from $13.3 million. The company maintains approximately $14 million in working capital. Management expects new product sales to accelerate through 2025 and beyond, with tariff mitigation strategies leveraging European operations.
